name: jackal-plugins
description: Jack Greaney's Claude Code plugins — hard forks of ed3d-house-style and ed3d-plan-and-execute, plus original jackal-* plugins. Install vanilla ed3d-* plugins from the @ed3d-plugins marketplace.

plugins.name: ed3d-house-style
plugins.description: Jackal fork of ed3d house style — coding standards, TypeScript, React, Postgres, and testing patterns.

plugins.name: ed3d-plan-and-execute
plugins.description: Jackal fork of ed3d-plan-and-execute — planning and execution workflows for Claude Code.

plugins.name: jackal-supervisor
plugins.description: Jackal workflow supervisor — skills for design, implementation, branch management, and UI verification. Wraps ed3d-plan-and-execute with project-specific configuration.

plugins.name: jackal-linear
plugins.description: DEPRECATED. Integrated Linear issue tracking with the ed3d-plan-and-execute workflow.
